command_log.command: if [ -f package.json ]; then echo 'javascript'; elif [ -f Cargo.toml ]; then echo 'rust'; elif [ -f go.mod ]; then echo 'go'; else echo 'unknown'; fi
branch: condition='grep -q javascript .wheel/outputs/detected-language.txt' exit=1 target=fallback-analysis

steps.output:
## unknown Analysis
No detailed analyzer for this language yet.
File count: 264

command_log.command: LANG=$(cat .wheel/outputs/detected-language.txt) && echo "## ${LANG} Analysis" && echo 'No detailed analyzer for this language yet.' && echo "File count: $(find . -maxdepth 3 -type f | wc -l | tr -d ' ')"

mkdir -p .wheel && WORKFLOW=$(cat workflows/example.json) && jq -n --arg wf_file "workflows/example.json" --argjson wf_json "$WORKFLOW" '{workflow_file: $wf_file, workflow_json: $wf_json}' > .wheel/pending.json && echo "Pending file written" && cat .wheel/pending.json | jq '.workflow_file'

PLUGIN_DIR="$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.441" && WHEEL_LIB_DIR="${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/state.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/workflow.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/dispatch.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/lock.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/context.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/engine.sh" && WORKFLOW_FILE="workflows/count-to-100.json" && WORKFLOW=$(workflow_load "$WORKFLOW_FILE") && if [[ $? -ne 0 ]]; then echo "ERROR: Workflow validation failed."; exit 1; fi && if ! workflow_validate_unique_ids "$WORKFLOW"; then echo "ERROR: Duplicate step IDs."; exit 1; fi && echo "Validation passed" && echo "$WORKFLOW" | jq -r '.name'

ls -la .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && cat .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | jq '.' || echo "No state file found" ; echo "---" ; ls .wheel/pending.json 2>/dev/null && echo "pending.json still exists" || echo "pending.json consumed"

ls -la /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/.wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null || echo "No state files found"; ls -la /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/.wheel/pending.json 2>/dev/null || echo "pending.json gone"

for f in /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/.wheel/state_*.json; do echo "=== $(basename $f) ==="; jq '{workflow_name, cursor, status, current_step: (.workflow_json.steps[.cursor].id // "done")}' "$f"; done

cat .wheel/outputs/detected-language.txt 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; cat .wheel/outputs/fallback-analysis.txt 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; cat .wheel/outputs/js-analysis.txt 2>/dev/null || echo "no js-analysis (skipped)"
date +%s
ls -lt /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/.wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | head -10
cat /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/.wheel/outputs/check-env.txt 2>/dev/null || echo "check-env.txt not found"
grep -l "example" /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/.wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null || echo "No example state file found"
mkdir -p reports

for f in /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/.wheel/state_0f1fe6bf-0236-4f54-bd9b-71b6b375a9bd_a84f9a7a92e2925f3.json /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/.wheel/state_0f1fe6bf-0236-4f54-bd9b-71b6b375a9bd_af6cb431d75284805.json; do echo "=== $(basename $f) ==="; jq '{workflow_name, cursor, status}' "$f"; done

PLUGIN_DIR="$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.441" && WHEEL_LIB_DIR="${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/state.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/workflow.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/dispatch.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/lock.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/context.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/engine.sh" && WORKFLOW_FILE="workflows/count-to-100.json" && WORKFLOW=$(workflow_load "$WORKFLOW_FILE") && WF_NAME=$(echo "$WORKFLOW" | jq -r '.name') && STEP_COUNT=$(echo "$WORKFLOW" | jq '.steps | length') && FIRST_STEP_ID=$(echo "$WORKFLOW" | jq -r '.steps[0].id') && FIRST_STEP_TYPE=$(echo "$WORKFLOW" | jq -r '.steps[0].type') && echo "Workflow '$WF_NAME' started ($STEP_COUNT steps)." && echo "First step: $FIRST_STEP_ID ($FIRST_STEP_TYPE)" && STATE_FILE=$(ls -t .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1 || true) && if [[ -n "$STATE_FILE" && -f "$STATE_FILE" ]]; then OWNER_SID=$(jq -r '.owner_session_id // "(unknown)"' "$STATE_FILE"); OWNER_AID=$(jq -r '.owner_agent_id // "(none)"' "$STATE_FILE"); CURRENT_CURSOR=$(jq -r '.cursor' "$STATE_FILE"); echo "State file: $(basename $STATE_FILE)"; echo "Owner: session=$OWNER_SID agent=$OWNER_AID"; CURRENT_STEP_ID=$(echo "$WORKFLOW" | jq -r --argjson idx "$CURRENT_CURSOR" '.steps[$idx].id // "complete"'); if [[ "$CURRENT_CURSOR" -gt 0 ]]; then echo "Kickstarted: advanced to step $CURRENT_STEP_ID"; fi; elif [[ ! -f ".wheel/pending.json" ]]; then echo "Workflow completed during kickstart (all steps were automatic)."; else echo "WARNING: State file not created — pending.json still exists."; echo "The PostToolUse hook may not have intercepted the activate call."; fi

ls -la .wheel/history/success/count-to-100*.json 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && ls -la .wheel/outputs/count-100-result.txt 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && cat .wheel/outputs/count-100-result.txt 2>/dev/null | head -5 && echo "..." && cat .wheel/outputs/count-100-result.txt 2>/dev/null | tail -5

ls -la /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/.wheel/pending.json 2>/dev/null; ls -la /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/.wheel/state*.json 2>/dev/null; ls -la /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/.wheel/history/ 2>/dev/null
cat /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/reports/language-analysis.md 2>/dev/null || echo "FILE_DOES_NOT_EXIST"
ls -lt .wheel/history/success/count-to-100*.json | head -1 && echo "---" && cat .wheel/outputs/count-100-result.txt | wc -l
ls -lt /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/.wheel/history/success/ | head -5

WORKFLOW_NAME="loop-test" && WORKFLOW_FILE="workflows/${WORKFLOW_NAME}.json" && if [[ ! -f "$WORKFLOW_FILE" ]]; then echo "ERROR: Workflow file not found: $WORKFLOW_FILE"; echo "Available workflows:"; ls workflows/*.json 2>/dev/null || echo "  (none)"; exit 1; fi && echo "Found: $WORKFLOW_FILE" && cat "$WORKFLOW_FILE"
cat .wheel/state_0f1fe6bf-0236-4f54-bd9b-71b6b375a9bd_a8b4d043f67d293b7.json 2>/dev/null | jq '{status, cursor, steps: [.steps[] | {id, status, completed_at}]}' || echo "State file not found"
for f in /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/.wheel/state_*.json; do echo "$(basename $f): $(jq -r '.workflow_name' "$f")"; done
